name: vrm2pmx-rust-runtime
notes: Rust Wasm module extracts JSON + BIN chunks from GLB and passes them to the JS bridge.
JS bridge (pmxWriter.js) builds a minimal PMX 2.0 binary: correct vertices/faces/materials, 1 bone (センター), no morphs/physics.
First end-to-end PMX output milestone (動くところまで). Bones/morphs/physics to be added incrementally.
